===={{aniseries|XY}}====
Katherine is a {{tc|Furisode Girl}} loyal to [[Laverre City]] [[Gym Leader]] [[Valerie]]. She and another Furisode Girl, [[Blossom]], were first seen spying on {{an|Serena}} and {{an|Bonnie}} when they were looking through Valerie's fashion collection. They thought they would be perfect to participate in a fashion show of Valerie's collection and asked them to come with them. They brought them to Valerie and Katherine introduced them to her. 

Katherine reappeared in ''[[XY074|Fairy-Type Trickery!]]'', where she followed {{Ash}} and Valerie's [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}}.

She reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''.
